---
title: "power analysis"
author: "Sam"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
install.packages("semPower")
install.packages("lavaan")
library(semPower)
library(lavaan)

model_2factor <- '
factor1 =~ x1 + x2 + x3 + x4
factor2 =~ x5 + x6 + x7

factor1 ~~ factor2
'
model_1factor <- '
factor1 =~ X1 + x2 + x3 + x4 + x5 + x6 + x7

'

cfa_2factor_lib <- semPower.aPriori(0.08,
                             'RMSEA',
                             alpha = .05,
                             power = .95,
                             df = semPower.getDf(model_2factor))

cfa_2factor_con <- semPower.aPriori(0.06,
                             'RMSEA',
                             alpha = .05,
                             power = .95,
                             df = semPower.getDf(model_2factor))

cfa_1factor_lib <- semPower.aPriori(0.08,
                             'RMSEA',
                             alpha = .05,
                             power = .95,
                             df = semPower.getDf(model_1factor))

cfa_1factor_con <- semPower.aPriori(0.06,
                             'RMSEA',
                             alpha = .05,
                             power = .95,
                             df = semPower.getDf(model_1factor))

summary(cfa_2factor_lib$requiredN)
summary(cfa_2factor_con$requiredN)
summary(cfa_1factor_lib$requiredN)
summary(cfa_1factor_con$requiredN)


```
